steps.title: Calculate the base charge
steps.content:
The first $25$ people cost $22$ dollars each:
$$25\cdot22=550$$

steps.title: Add the extra-person charge
steps.content: For a group with $n$ people, the number of additional people is $n-25$. Each additional person costs $14$, so the total charge is $$550+14(n-25)$$ $$=550+14n-350$$ $$=14n+200$$ The answer is A.
